stemHtml: According to Part-FCL, what documents shall always be carried by the pilot when exercising the privileges of the flight crew licence?

options.a: The pilot’s valid flight crew licence, his/her up-to-date flight time records, and a valid personnel personal identification document containing his/her photo.
options.b: The pilot’s valid flight crew licence, his/her valid medical certificate, and a personal identification document containing his/her photo.
options.c: The pilot’s valid flight crew licence, his/her valid medical certificate, a recent passport photo, and up-to-date flight time records.
options.d: The pilot’s valid medical certificate, a recent passport photo, and up-to-date flight time records.
